title: Bhoomi Sutrum Lyrics Naaigal Jaakirathai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Bhoomi Sutrum
Singer(s): Haricharan
Movie: Naaigal Jaakirathai
Music: Dharan Kumar

Oyaadhey oyaadhey
or naalum manmeley
theeraadhey sogangal
oyndhey nee ponaaley.

Boomi suttrum varaye
vaanam vattrum varaye
naamum ingae adhupol
oyve indri vervai sindha

Paadhai sellum varaye
bhaashai sollum varaye
thedal konda maname
thengaamal nee kaattrai mundha

Ottiya vedhanai odidum varayil
pathiyamaai iruppom
Muttidum theemayin moochayum parithu
vettriyum kaipidipom pidipom

Boomi suttrum varaye
vaanam vattrum varaye
naamum ingae adhupol
oyve indri vervai sindha

Paadhai sellum varaye
bhaashai sollum varaye
thedal konda maname
thengaamal nee kaattrai mundha

Oyaadhey oyaadhey
or naalum manmeley
theeraadhey sogangal
oyndhey nee ponaaley.

Mudiyaadhadhe ingum edhuvumillai
mull endru nagarndhaale pagale illai
idithaangavum nenjil valuvulladhey
innalgal emai paarthu bayam kolludhey.

Boomi suttrum varaye
vaanam vattrum varaye
naamum ingae adhupol
oyve indri vervai sindha

Paadhai sellum varaye
bhaashai sollum varaye
thedal konda maname
thengaamal nee kaattrai mundha

Ottiya vedhanai odidum varayil
pathiyamaai iruppom
Muttidum theemayin moochayum parithu
vettriyum kaipidipom pidipom

Boomi suttrum varaye
vaanam vattrum varaye
naamum ingae adhupol
oyve indri vervai sindha

Paadhai sellum varaye
bhaashai sollum varaye
thedal konda maname
thengaamal nee kaattrai mundha

Oyaadhey oyaadhey
or naalum manmeley
theeraadhey sogangal
oyndhey nee ponaaley.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Bhoomi Sutrum?

The song conveys themes of resilience and motivation, encouraging listeners to face life's challenges head-on.

What is the plot context of Naaigal Jaakirathai related to this song?

This song is featured in a pivotal moment of the film, highlighting the protagonist's journey and determination.

Who is the singer of Bhoomi Sutrum?

The song is sung by the talented Haricharan.

Who composed the music for Naaigal Jaakirathai?

The music for the film was composed by Dharan Kumar.

When was Bhoomi Sutrum released?

The song was released on September 1, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Bhoomi Sutrum, the protagonist's spirit is captured through vibrant and motivational lyrics that resonate with the audience. The song serves as an anthem of resilience, encouraging listeners to overcome obstacles and embrace their journey. With its energetic beats and uplifting melody, it evokes feelings of empowerment and determination. This track perfectly complements the adventurous theme of Naaigal Jaakirathai, making it a memorable part of the film's narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Bhoomi Sutrum from the movie Naaigal Jaakirathai is an energetic anthem that inspires listeners to embrace life's challenges. With Haricharan's powerful vocals and Dharan Kumar's vibrant composition, this song is sure to uplift your spirits. Dive into the rhythmic beats and motivational lyrics that make this track a must-listen!
stanzaMeanings: Don't let any day pass by without feeling sad when you leave.
The earth rotates and the sky revolves, we are here thinking without any worries.
The path is set, the language is spoken, the mind that seeks should not be without direction.
We will remain as a part of the pain that chases us, we will hold on to the breath of the storm and the victory of the struggle.
The earth rotates and the sky revolves, we are here thinking without any worries.
The path is set, the language is spoken, the mind that seeks should not be without direction.
Don't let any day pass by without feeling sad when you leave.
We have come to conquer life. Even in the watery depths, we will see the fish.
Nothing is impossible here, if we say there is a thorn, there will be no day. The past fills the heart with fear.
The earth rotates and the sky revolves, we are here thinking without any worries.
The path is set, the language is spoken, the mind that seeks should not be without direction.
We will remain as a part of the pain that chases us, we will hold on to the breath of the storm and the victory of the struggle.
The earth rotates and the sky revolves, we are here thinking without any worries.
The path is set, the language is spoken, the mind that seeks should not be without direction.
Don't let any day pass by without feeling sad when you leave.
